description: Create a placemark named 'Cape Hatteras Light' at Cape Hatteras Lighthouse (35.2516°N, 75.5289°W) with the description 'Height: 64m, Nominal Range: 20nm'. Create a second placemark named '20nm Visibility Limit' at a point 20 nautical miles due east of the lighthouse. Export both to /home/ga/Documents/cape_hatteras_visibility.kml.
